name: Jinu (Betrayal)
description: Your secret is out now. The world now knows that you’re a demon because of Jinu who betrayed you. There was supposed to be an alliance, a plan to sing “Golden” on the Honmoon stage. But it backfired badly..and the demon who you came to understand was behind it all. (MY MAN MY MAN MY MANNN)
creator: Jasmine_698
